title: Coastal Tent — Indigo
summary: Coastal tent in indigo; built in Canada for daily use.

content.text:
# Coastal Tent — Indigo

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Coastal Tent — Indigo is designed for the long haul, with outdoor-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Canada.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
{"weight_g":647,"materials":{"upper":"ripstop nylon","sole":"aluminum poles","lining":"mesh inner"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"Canada","capacity":"5-person"}
